page_content:
Prerequisite: ENES220, ENES221, and MATH246; and (MATH206 or ENME202).

Restriction: Must be in Engineering: Mechanical program.

ENME371 Product Engineering and Manufacturing (3 Credits) Business aspects of engineering product development. Relationship of design and manufacturing. Product specification. Statistical process control. Design team development. The development process. Prerequisite: ENES221; and (ENME392 or STAT400).
